PROP-baseauction-inv-075.text: transmit must validate all feed IDs as allowlisted BEFORE calling verifyBulk.
PROP-baseauction-inv-075.assertion: forall transmit: pre-validation loop checks s_dataStreamsFeedIdToAsset[feedId]!=0 before verify

locations.note: lines 140-150: pre-validation loop decodes feedId from unverified reportData, checks s_dataStreamsFeedIdToAsset != 0; verifyBulk called at line 153
